chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Affection for Women

text: 4350 - رَوَى أَبُو مَالِكٍ اَلْحَضْرَمِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْعَبَّاسِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ اَلصَّادِقَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: "اَلْعَبْدُ كُلَّمَا اِزْدَادَ لِلنِّسَاءِ حُبّاً اِزْدَادَ فِي اَلْإِيمَانِ فَضْلاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4350 - Abu Malik al-Hadrami narrated from Abu al-Abbas, who said that he heard Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) say: "The more love a servant has for women, the greater he increases in faith and virtue."
